debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
f✝ : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
⊢ Continuous fun x =>
    { toFun := fun y => ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f, map_add' := ⋯,
      map_smul' := ⋯, cont := ⋯ }
